stem: A public health study surveys 100 residents surveyed and observes 44 positive outcomes out of 100 (44.0%). Estimate the true vaccination coverage and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.44. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3467, 0.5377]. Point estimate: 0.4422.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
